overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban street. The player moves along wet sidewalks past towering buildings with holographic advertisements, passing under an elevated highway overpass and approaching a commercial intersection with shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban sidewalk beside elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a metal railing, observing the neon-lit building facades and approaching the overpass ahead

entered.detail: towering skyscraper with illuminated windows and vertical neon accents rising into the night sky
black metal safety railing running along the left edge of the sidewalk
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light onto the rain-slicked pavement
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying video content on the building facade
rain-slicked orange-brown pavement tiles reflecting the street lights and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban sidewalk at night, with the camera moving forward past a metal railing. A towering neon-lit skyscraper dominates the left side while street lamps cast warm light on the wet orange pavement. The atmosphere is cyberpunk-inspired with artificial lighting and light rain falling.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass with steel girders overhead

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the highway overpass with large steel girders and illuminated billboards overhead, moving through the sheltered industrial corridor

entered.detail: rusted steel support beams and framework of the elevated highway structure overhead
multiple illuminated advertisement screens mounted on the underside of the overpass displaying video content
industrial facade with metal scaffolding, walkways, and blue-tinted lighting on the right side

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass. Steel girders and illuminated billboards dominate the overhead space while industrial buildings line the right side. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed, with the rain still visible but less direct. The tall neon building from the previous segment recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching intersection with brick warehouse buildings

events.description: pedestrian in yellow jacket appears walking across the street ahead, first human figure encountered

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street as it opens up approaching an intersection, passing industrial brick buildings and encountering a pedestrian crossing the road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking across the wet street from left to right

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with graffiti, metal roll-up doors, and warm exterior lighting
green illuminated street sign mounted on the brick building wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass, the street opens up into a more industrial area with red brick warehouse buildings on the right. The lighting remains low and atmospheric with rain continuing to fall. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket crosses the street ahead, marking the first human presence in the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with neon-lit shop fronts and bollards

events.description: exiting the industrial area into a commercial zone with bright shop signage and pedestrian activity
slowing approach while navigating around bollards near the shop entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the street corner with the Manufactory shop, navigating around black and white bollards while observing pedestrians near the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and walking near the shop entrance ahead

entered.detail: commercial establishment with large illuminated MANUFACTORY signage and bright teal interior lighting
red and white neon signs and digital displays above the shop entrance
black and white striped bollards blocking vehicle access to the pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a commercial intersection featuring the Manufactory shop with prominent neon signage. The ground transitions to cobblestone paving with bollards marking the pedestrian zone. Several pedestrians are visible near the shop entrance, and the lighting shifts to vibrant neon colors from the storefronts, contrasting with the darker industrial area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a towering neon district into a dark industrial underpass and finally toward a vibrant commercial intersection. It begins on a wet orange sidewalk beneath a massive neon-lit skyscraper, moving forward past a metal railing under a light drizzle. As the camera advances, the open street gives way to a semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway overpass, where the lighting becomes darker and enclosed by steel girders and illuminated billboards. The scene then opens up into an industrial area characterized by red brick warehouses and the appearance of a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, before the camera turns toward a bustling commercial hub. Finally, the terrain shifts to cobblestone paving as the camera approaches the Manufactory shop, where the atmosphere transforms into a glow of vibrant neon storefronts and gathering crowds.
